title: YonKaGor Pack
description: YonKaGor themed texture tweaks, tweaking a few things in Minecraft to look more YonKaGor
body:
**Probably won't be updating this due to issues in my personal life.**

YonKaGor themed tweaked textures.

All textures:
Arrow, Bow pulling arrow, Diamond tools/armor inventory items, Ender eye, Ender pearl, Fire charge, Golden apple, Mace, Snowball, Spyglass (Speckle reference), Totem (YonKaGor main OC), Bucket of tropical fish (Clownfish reference), Water bucket, Painting: "alban", Sweep particle, "Wild" armor trim, diamond color palette for armor trims, Armor bar HUD.
